title: Agent SDK loop：从 prompt 到结果的 5 个阶段
title_en: Agent SDK Loop: 5 Phases from Prompt to Result

body.overview: Agent SDK 运行一个托管循环，自动处理工具执行。你发送 prompt，SDK 驱动 Claude 经历「评估 → 工具调用 → 结果回传」的循环，直到 Claude 没有更多操作需要执行，然后返回包含费用和 token 用量的最终结果。

components.name: SystemMessage（初始化）
components.role: 循环开始时产出一次，携带 session 元数据（session ID、配置）

components.name: AssistantMessage
components.role: 每次 Claude 响应时产出，包含文本和/或工具调用请求

components.name: UserMessage（工具结果）
components.role: SDK 自动执行工具后，将执行结果回传给 Claude 时产出

components.name: ResultMessage
components.role: 循环结束时产出一次，包含最终文本、token 用量、费用和 session ID

body.flow: 1. SDK 将 prompt + 工具定义 + 历史发给 Claude → 产出 SystemMessage。2. Claude 评估并响应 → SDK 产出 AssistantMessage（可能含工具调用）。3. 若有工具调用：SDK 执行之，产出 UserMessage，将结果回传 Claude。4. 步骤 2-3 重复（每一轮 = 一个 turn）。5. 当 Claude 响应不再包含工具调用 → SDK 产出最终 AssistantMessage + ResultMessage，循环结束。

body_en.overview: The Agent SDK runs a managed loop that handles tool execution automatically. You send a prompt; the SDK drives Claude through evaluate → tool-call → result cycles until Claude has nothing left to do, then delivers a final result with cost and usage stats.

components.name: SystemMessage (init)
components.role: Yielded once at the start with session metadata (session ID, config)

components.name: AssistantMessage
components.role: Yielded each time Claude responds — contains text and/or tool call requests

components.name: UserMessage (tool results)
components.role: Yielded when the SDK feeds tool execution output back to Claude automatically

components.name: ResultMessage
components.role: Yielded once at the end with final text, token usage, cost, and session ID

body_en.flow: 1. SDK sends prompt + tool definitions + history to Claude → yields SystemMessage. 2. Claude evaluates and responds → SDK yields AssistantMessage (may include tool calls). 3. If tool calls exist: SDK executes them, yields UserMessage with results, feeds results back to Claude. 4. Steps 2–3 repeat (each cycle = one 'turn'). 5. When Claude responds with no tool calls → SDK yields final AssistantMessage + ResultMessage. Loop ends.
